heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 460gg–13 Authorization of appropriations

(b) of section 5, relating to the deauthorization of the Asotin Dam, was not classified to the Code.section 5 of Pub. L. 94–199section 1276(a) of this title

children.heading: Acquisition of lands
children.label: a Acquisition of lands
children.text: There is hereby authorized to be appropriated the sum of not more than $10,000,000 for the acquisition of lands and interests in lands within the recreation area.

children.heading: Development of recreation facilities
children.label: b Development of recreation facilities
children.text: There is hereby authorized to be appropriated the sum of not more than $10,000,000 for the development of recreation facilities within the recreation area.

children.heading: Inventory, identification, development and protection of historic and archeological sites
children.label: c Inventory, identification, development and protection of historic and archeological sites
children.text: There is hereby authorized to be appropriated the sum of not more than $1,500,000 for the inventory, identification, development, and protection of the historic and archeological sites described in section 5 of this Act.
